origin.name: Burkina Faso
origin.key_document: Acte de deces (death certificate in French, requires certified English translation)
origin.source: FCDO Burkina Faso travel advice, updated 2025; British Embassy Ouagadougou guidance
origin.cremation_note: Cremation is not widely available in Burkina Faso. Full body repatriation is the standard approach.

destinations.name: United Kingdom
key_documents: Acte de deces (certified English translation required)
special_rules: The FCDO advises against all travel to most of Burkina Faso due to the security situation.
All French-language documentation requires certified English translation for UK acceptance.
Police clearance is required for all violent or suspicious deaths.
Contact the FCDO emergency line immediately: +44 (0)20 7008 5000.
destinations.dest_reception: The UK funeral director takes custody at the cargo terminal. All documentation must be in certified English translation. The coroner for the district is notified. Straightforward cases proceed directly to funeral arrangements.
destinations.dest_consular_note: FCDO 24-hour emergency line: +44 (0)20 7008 5000. The British Embassy in Ouagadougou can register the death and advise on local funeral directors. They cannot pay for or arrange repatriation.
destinations.seo_title: Burkina Faso to UK Repatriation: Guidance for Families
destinations.seo_description: Someone has died in Burkina Faso. Repatriation to the UK takes 3-5 weeks. FCDO liaison, French translation, and export permits all handled. Contact us 24/7.
